import os
from pathlib import Path
from flask import Flask, request, send_file, abort

app = Flask(__name__)
UPLOAD_DIR = Path("/data/uploads").resolve()


@app.route("/files/<path:filename>")
def serve_file(filename):
    filepath = (UPLOAD_DIR / filename).resolve()
    if not filepath.is_relative_to(UPLOAD_DIR):
        abort(403, "Access denied")
    with open(filepath) as f:
        return f.read()


@app.route("/download")
def download():
    path = request.args.get("path")
    resolved = Path(path).resolve()
    if not resolved.is_relative_to(UPLOAD_DIR):
        abort(403, "Access denied")
    return send_file(resolved)


@app.route("/upload", methods=["POST"])
def upload():
    filename = request.form["filename"]
    filepath = (UPLOAD_DIR / filename).resolve()
    if not filepath.is_relative_to(UPLOAD_DIR):
        abort(403, "Invalid filename")
    request.files["file"].save(filepath)
    return {"path": str(filepath)}


def read_user_file(user_path: str) -> str:
    full_path = (Path("/data") / user_path).resolve()
    if not full_path.is_relative_to(Path("/data")):
        raise ValueError("Path traversal detected")
    with open(full_path) as f:
        return f.read()
